calendar.matters:
Motion For Sanctions Against Martin S. Ross
Off Calendar Feb-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Wong, 510-684-2759, defendant and moving party appearing propria persona

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT DAVID WONG'S Motion For Sanctions Against Martin S. Ross IS DENIED. MOTION WAS NOT FILED WITH THE REQUIRED 16 DAYS NOTICE AND IN ANY EVENT CCP SECTION 177.5 IS NOT A MECHANISM FOR ENFORCEMENT OF A JUDGMENT. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB/PM)
